candidates.why: Clearly labeled total top-line revenue for the firm.

candidates.row_label: Raw materials and change in inventories
candidates.why: This is a direct production cost and functions as cost of goods sold.
Balance sheet stock of raw materials, not a flow expense; not appropriate for COGS.

final_choice.row_label: Raw materials and change in inventories

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A stock-based compensation, part of overhead.
Typical SG&A-type overhead bucket (other operating expenses).
Another SG&A-type overhead bucket; appears to be a component of other operating expenses.
Classic SG&A administrative overhead component.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization is D&A, which should be excluded from SG&A per instructions.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Amortization of intangibles is excluded per rule to exclude D&A from SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Directly represents expense associated with capitalized R&D; best proxy for R&D expense among candidates.
Balance sheet asset, not a period expense.
Gross capitalized R&D asset balance, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset, not current period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not an expense.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

candidates.why: Net interest line; useful fallback if specific expense lines are missing for some years.
Primary pure interest expense line item; best first choice for XINT.
Interest portion of lease liabilities; a component of total interest expense.
Additional interest expense/income line; acts as alternative label for interest costs.
Represents minority interests, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of interest on lease liabilities; still part of interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Non-controlling interest lines are excluded as they are equity, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Changes in the fair value of equity investments at fair value through other comprehensive income
candidates.why: OCI component, not total book equity.
Single investment line, not total equity.
Represents total shareholders’ equity/book equity on the balance sheet.
Balancing item, not the main equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity itself.
Represents total assets/liabilities+equity, not equity alone.
Income statement attribution to non-controlling interests; valid representation of minority interest.
Balance sheet minority interest; core MIB measure of equity attributable to non-controlling interests.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests on balance sheet; also valid MIB line.
Income statement minority interest total; another valid MIB indicator.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income portion attributable to minorities; not the equity stock, but related.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income before allocating to minorities; not a minority interest amount per se.

variables.notes: Prioritized balance sheet measures of minority equity, then income statement attributions as alternatives.
